name: American Truck Simulator
description: Experience legendary American trucks and deliver various cargoes across sunny California, sandy Nevada, and the Grand Canyon State of Arizona. American Truck Simulator takes you on a journey through the breathtaking landscapes and widely recognized landmarks around the States.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6400 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200 or similar
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon RX 460 or Intel HD 630 (2GB VRAM)
  • Storage: 25 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Disk Space for American Truck Simulator base game
comment1: Very little stress in this game, Great graphics, realistic as you want it to be.
comment2:
I recommend the game, but I have some complaints about the new Illinois DLC. As a man that has driven many roads in this abhorrent state I have complaints. I personally hate Illinois, but I live here and don't like the injustice this DLC has done to it. For a starter I have not hit a single pot hole, or construction zone. The state police are also way to timid. In real Illinois they will pull you over for even thinking about making an infraction. All in all I give 10/10 and 
 I give the DLC a 7/10 would have been higher if not for the above comments.
comment3: Great game makes me feel like a true american. ive been waiting a year now for the lot lizard DLC cant wait to get my hog cranked by Barb gobbless
